name: Revenue Growth Rate
description: % increase in revenue over a period
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — tracks the trend of revenue changes period-over-period

name: Net Profit Margin
description: Net income as a % of revenue
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — monitors margin trend; overlay with a target reference line

name: Gross Profit Margin
description: Revenue minus COGS, as a % of revenue
chartRecommendation: Combo Chart (Bar + Line) — bars show absolute gross profit, line shows margin %

name: EBITDA
description: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation & amortisation
chartRecommendation: Waterfall Chart — breaks down how revenue flows through to EBITDA

name: Return on Investment (ROI)
description: Gain from investment relative to its cost
chartRecommendation: Bullet Chart — compares actual ROI against a benchmark or target

name: Return on Equity (ROE)
description: Net income relative to shareholder equity
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — shows ROE trend across reporting periods

name: Current Ratio
description: Current assets divided by current liabilities (liquidity)
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — instantly shows whether the ratio is above or below the safe threshold

name: Debt-to-Equity Ratio
description: Total liabilities vs. shareholder equity
chartRecommendation: Stacked Bar Chart — visualises the split between debt and equity financing over time

name: Operating Cash Flow
description: Cash generated from core business operations
chartRecommendation: Waterfall Chart — shows cash inflows and outflows leading to net operating cash

name: Burn Rate
description: How fast a company spends its cash reserves (startups)
chartRecommendation: Area Chart — illustrates cash depletion over time, making the runway visible

name: Working Capital Ratio
description: Short-term financial health indicator
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — highlights whether short-term financial health is in the safe zone

name: Cash Conversion Cycle (CCC)
description: Time to convert inventory into cash flow
chartRecommendation: Stacked Bar Chart — each segment shows DIO, DSO, and DPO components

name: Economic Value Added (EVA)
description: Profit after deducting cost of capital
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares EVA across periods or business units

name: Revenue per Employee
description: Efficiency of workforce relative to output
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares productivity across teams, departments, or companies

name: Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
description: Average days to collect payment after a sale
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — tracks collection efficiency trend; flag spikes as early warning

name: Total Sales / Revenue
description: Overall income generated
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — the classic revenue trend line across weeks, months, or quarters

name: Sales Growth Rate
description: Period-over-period increase in sales
chartRecommendation: Column Chart — period-over-period growth bars make acceleration or slowdown clear

name: Conversion Rate
description: % of leads that become paying customers
chartRecommendation: Funnel Chart — maps the drop-off at each stage from lead to closed customer

name: Average Deal Size
description: Mean value of closed sales
chartRecommendation: Box Plot — shows distribution of deal sizes and highlights outliers

name: Sales Cycle Length
description: Average time to close a deal
chartRecommendation: Histogram — shows frequency distribution of deal durations

name: Quota Attainment
description: % of sales reps hitting their targets
chartRecommendation: Bullet Chart — each rep's actual attainment vs. quota target in a compact bar

name: Pipeline Value
description: Total value of deals in the sales pipeline
chartRecommendation: Funnel Chart — total value stacked by pipeline stage shows coverage at a glance

name: Win Rate
description: % of deals won vs. total deals pursued
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — quickly communicates whether the win rate is above or below target

name: Lead Velocity Rate (LVR)
description: Month-over-month growth in qualified leads
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — month-on-month growth in qualified leads as a trend

name: Sales Velocity
description: Speed at which leads move through the pipeline
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — plots the pace at which value moves through the pipeline over time

name: Upsell / Cross-sell Rate
description: % of customers purchasing additional products
chartRecommendation: Stacked Column Chart — separates base revenue from upsell/cross-sell contributions

name: Opportunity-to-Win Ratio
description: Efficiency of converting opportunities to closed deals
chartRecommendation: Funnel Chart — opportunities narrowing down to won deals illustrates conversion depth

name: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
description: Cost to acquire one new customer
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — monitors CAC trend alongside CAC:LTV ratio for context

name: Return on Ad Spend (ROAS)
description: Revenue generated per £/$ spent on ads
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares ROAS across campaigns, channels, or time periods

name: Click-Through Rate (CTR)
description: % of people who click on an ad or link
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — trends CTR over time, often broken down by channel or ad type

name: Cost Per Click (CPC)
description: Average cost per individual ad click
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — tracks cost efficiency trend across campaigns or bidding periods

name: Cost Per Lead (CPL)
description: Cost to generate one lead
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares CPL across campaigns or channels to identify best performers

name: Marketing Qualified Leads (MQLs)
description: Leads deemed likely to convert
chartRecommendation: Column Chart — volume of MQLs by period; overlay with SQL conversion rate

name: Brand Awareness
description: Measured via surveys, reach, and impressions
chartRecommendation: Area Chart — builds a picture of cumulative reach and awareness growth over time

name: Email Open Rate / Click Rate
description: Engagement with email campaigns
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — dual-line chart with open rate and click rate on the same axis

name: Marketing Attributed Revenue
description: Revenue directly tied to marketing efforts
chartRecommendation: Waterfall Chart — shows which campaigns and channels contributed to total revenue

name: Share of Voice (SOV)
description: Brand's presence vs. competitors in the market
chartRecommendation: Donut Chart — shows brand's share vs. named competitors as proportional slices

name: Content Engagement Rate
description: Interactions per piece of content published
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — ranks content pieces or topics by engagement rate

name: Organic Traffic Growth
description: Increase in unpaid website visitors over time
chartRecommendation: Area Chart — cumulative organic visitor growth makes the upward trend tangible

name: Time on Page
description: Average duration visitors spend on a web page
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — ranks pages by average time spent, highlighting top-performing content

name: Ad Frequency
description: Average number of times a person sees your ad
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — monitors ad frequency to detect audience fatigue

name: Net Promoter Score (NPS)
description: Likelihood of customers recommending you (scale 0–10)
chartRecommendation: Stacked Bar Chart — segments of Promoters, Passives, and Detractors per period

name: Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)
description: Satisfaction rating post-interaction
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — clearly shows current satisfaction level against the target band

name: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV / LTV)
description: Total revenue expected from a customer over their relationship
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares LTV across customer segments or cohorts

name: Customer Retention Rate
description: % of customers retained over a period
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — retention trend over time; often shown alongside churn rate

name: Customer Churn Rate
description: % of customers lost over a period
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — churn trend with period annotations for product or pricing changes

name: Customer Effort Score (CES)
description: How easy it is to do business with you
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — CES sits on a simple scale, making a gauge the clearest display

name: Customer Health Score
description: Composite score predicting churn or expansion
chartRecommendation: Heatmap — a grid of customers vs. health dimensions reveals at-risk patterns

name: Product Adoption Rate
description: % of customers actively using a product/feature
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — adoption curve over time shows whether growth is accelerating

name: Repeat Purchase Rate
description: % of customers who buy more than once
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — tracks loyalty and retention trends in transactional businesses

name: Customer Engagement Score
description: Behavioural scoring across all touchpoints
chartRecommendation: Radar Chart — maps engagement across multiple dimensions (logins, features, support)

name: Referral Rate
description: % of new customers acquired through existing customers
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — referral rate trend highlights the impact of programme changes

name: Wallet Share
description: % of a customer's total spend captured by your business
chartRecommendation: Donut Chart — your share vs. competitors in a customer's total spend

name: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE)
description: Manufacturing productivity metric (Availability × Performance × Quality)
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — instantly communicates how close to world-class OEE the plant is

name: Order Fulfillment Cycle Time
description: Time from order placement to delivery
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares cycle times across product types, warehouses, or periods

name: Inventory Turnover
description: How often inventory is sold/replaced per period
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — turnover trend identifies over-stocking or supply chain issues

name: Capacity Utilisation Rate
description: % of production capacity currently in use
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — shows what % of capacity is in use vs. the optimal range

name: On-Time Delivery Rate
description: % of orders delivered on schedule
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — delivery performance trend; dips signal logistics problems

name: Cost per Unit Produced
description: Efficiency of production
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — cost efficiency trend over time; link to volume for context

name: Throughput Rate
description: Units produced per unit of time
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — production rate over time; useful for spotting bottleneck periods

name: Supplier Lead Time
description: Time between ordering and receiving from suppliers
chartRecommendation: Box Plot — shows the distribution and variability of lead times per supplier

name: Shrinkage Rate
description: Inventory lost to theft, damage, or administrative error
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares shrinkage by category, location, or time period

name: Process Adherence Rate
description: % of tasks completed per defined process / SOP
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — simple % adherence shown against a target compliance level

name: Mean Time to Repair (MTTR)
description: Average time to fix a failed system or process
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — MTTR trend; spikes flag systemic issues or resource shortfalls

name: Employee Turnover Rate
description: % of employees leaving over a period
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — turnover trend across periods; annotate with culture or pay events

name: Employee Satisfaction / Engagement Score
description: Workplace sentiment measure
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — benchmark current score against industry and internal targets

name: Absenteeism Rate
description: % of unplanned employee absences
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — monthly or quarterly absenteeism trend

name: Time to Hire
description: Days from job posting to offer acceptance
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — average days to hire across roles, departments, or time periods

name: Cost per Hire
description: Total recruiting cost per new employee
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares hiring cost across roles or sourcing channels

name: Training Completion Rate
description: % of staff completing required training
chartRecommendation: Stacked Bar Chart — completed vs. in-progress vs. not-started by team

name: Internal Promotion Rate
description: % of roles filled internally vs. externally
chartRecommendation: Column Chart — compares internal vs. external hires per period or department

name: HR-to-Employee Ratio
description: Number of HR staff per 100 employees
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — monitors ratio as headcount scales

name: Talent Density
description: % of high performers relative to total workforce
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — % high performers by department or team

name: Manager Effectiveness Score
description: Employee ratings of their direct managers
chartRecommendation: Radar Chart — maps effectiveness across multiple competency dimensions per manager

name: Retention Rate of Top Performers
description: Specifically tracking high-value staff retention
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — trend line with annotations for reward or culture changes

name: System Uptime / Availability
description: % of time systems are operational
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — % uptime displayed against the SLA target (e.g., 99.9%)

name: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
description: Reliability of systems between failure events
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — MTBF trend shows whether system reliability is improving

name: IT Cost as % of Revenue
description: Technology spend efficiency relative to revenue
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — tracks IT spend efficiency as the business scales

name: Incident Resolution Time
description: Average time to resolve IT issues
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — average resolution time by incident category or severity

name: Technical Debt Ratio
description: Cost of fixing existing code vs. cost of new development
chartRecommendation: Area Chart — growing area signals accumulating debt needing remediation

name: Deployment Frequency
description: How often new code / updates are released to production
chartRecommendation: Column Chart — deployments per week or month shows CI/CD maturity over time

name: Change Failure Rate
description: % of deployments causing failures or rollbacks
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — failure rate trend tied to release process improvements

name: API Response Time
description: Speed of application programming interfaces
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — latency trend with percentile overlays (p50, p95, p99)

name: Data Quality Score
description: Accuracy, completeness, and consistency of data
chartRecommendation: Gauge Chart — composite score displayed against a target quality threshold

name: License Utilisation Rate
description: % of purchased software licences actively used
chartRecommendation: Stacked Bar Chart — used vs. unused licences by software product

name: Cart Abandonment Rate
description: % of shoppers who add items but don't complete purchase
chartRecommendation: Funnel Chart — shows where customers drop off across the cart-to-checkout journey

name: Average Order Value (AOV)
description: Mean spend per transaction
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — AOV trend over time; overlay with promotional periods

name: Revenue per Visitor (RPV)
description: Revenue generated per site visitor
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — RPV trend with traffic source breakdown

name: Return on Ad Spend (ROAS)
description: E-commerce advertising efficiency
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — compares ROAS across campaigns, channels, or time periods

name: Checkout Completion Rate
description: % of users completing the checkout flow
chartRecommendation: Funnel Chart — step-by-step drop-off from cart entry to payment confirmation

name: Search Exit Rate
description: % of users who leave after using the site search
chartRecommendation: Bar Chart — ranks search queries by exit rate to identify gaps in the catalogue

name: Wishlist Conversion Rate
description: % of wishlist items that are eventually purchased
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — conversion rate trend from wishlisted items to purchases

name: Payment Failure Rate
description: % of transactions that fail at payment stage
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — failure rate trend; spikes indicate gateway or technical issues

name: Refund Rate
description: % of orders resulting in a refund
chartRecommendation: Line Chart — tracks refund rate trend alongside product or policy changes

name: Mobile vs. Desktop Conversion Split
description: Channel-specific conversion rate insights across devices
chartRecommendation: Grouped Bar Chart — side-by-side conversion rates for mobile and desktop by period
